items.author: @idavidrein
items.text: Typically computer security assumes your attacker doesn't start with a shell on your machine—in fact that's often the win condition. Security against potentially malicious AI agents is hard because by definition you've already given them read/write perms to most of your machine. My guess is we need totally new security
items.title: Typically computer security assumes your attacker doesn't start with a shell on your machine—in fact…
items.whyItMatters: 指出AI Agent安全需全新原语，对控制与对齐研究有直接意义。
items.summary: Typically computer security assumes your attacker doesn't start with a shell on your machine—in fact that's often the win condition. Security against potentially malicious AI agents is hard because by definition you've already given them read/write perms to most of your machine. My guess is we need totally new security

roundup.title: Fable 5 Returns, Gemini Omni Flash Ships
roundup.subtitle: Claude Fable 5 回归，Gemini 新图像视频模型发布
headline: @AnthropicAI 与 @cursor_ai 共同确认 Claude Fable 5 今日全球重新上线，新增网络安全分类器后恢复供应。@OpenRouter 同步恢复接入，部分 coding 请求暂时回退至 Opus 4.8。
@GoogleAIStudio 同时推出 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash，前者 4 秒出图仅 $0.034/1K 分辨率，后者原生支持视频生成与自然语言编辑。@GoogleAI 强调两者均为当前最快、最低成本的多模态模型。
@github 与 @runwayml 分别发布自定义 Agent 与 Agent Skills，支持 Markdown 定义 guardrails 和营销自动化 workflow。@figma 同步展示 Figma Agent 技能集成，标志 agent 产品进入实用阶段。
@HuggingPapers 报道 WeChat SkillHone 在 GAIA 基准上领先商业 deep-research agent 15.8 分，证明动态技能演化路径可行。@DrJimFan 则展示 ASPIRE 机器人自进化系统，实现 100 任务持续学习。

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 全球重新上线
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 在与美国政府沟通后重新部署 Fable 5，新增网络安全防护。

facts.text: Fable 5 今日起在 Cursor、OpenRouter 等平台恢复可用
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow

facts.text: 新增分类器用于阻断网络安全滥用请求
facts.quote: new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity misuse

bullish.text: Fable 5 leads all models on CursorBench

deepDives.title: Gemini Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Omni Flash 发布
deepDives.summary: Google 发布两款低成本高速度多模态模型，面向开发者流水线。

facts.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 文本生成图像 4 秒完成
facts.quote: delivers text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image

facts.text: Gemini Omni Flash 支持视频生成与自然语言编辑
facts.quote: enables you to refine videos using natural language

bullish.text: fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet

bullets.text: GitHub Copilot CLI 支持 Markdown 自定义 Agent 角色与 guardrails
Runway 推出 Agent Skills 一键生成广告营销内容
OpenWiki 两天内获 1.7k GitHub stars，支持多源集成
GPT-5.6 30 小时已超越 Claude Opus 64 小时加速记录
vLLM Qwen3-Omni 首音频延迟 0.6s，吞吐提升 5.4x
Sakana Fast-weight Product Key Memory 获 ICML 2026 口头报告
Allen AI FlexOlmo 架构适配轻量化丹麦基础模型
CursorBench 显示 Fable 5 仍为最强 coding 模型
Ollama Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上提速近 90%

topTweets.whyItMatters: 动态技能演化新范式验证

takeaways: Fable 5 回归后 coding agent 工具链需重新评估成本与安全策略。
Gemini 新模型将图像/视频生成成本压至毫秒级，适合高频开发者流水线。
Agent Skills 与自定义 guardrails 成为下一阶段产品标配，关注 Markdown 定义规范。
多模态 prompting 与 SkillHone 动态演化是当前 agent 性能提升最快路径。
